Fixed in 7a57a5e. The TCP probe path now treats unreadable port metadata the same way as missing or invalid metadata by catching the broader file-read failure path (`OSError` as well as parse error...

Fixed in 7a57a5e. Liveness and restart now probe all supported transports for the same `BU_NAME` before spawning or cleaning up. That prevents two daemons with the same name from coexisting across ...

Fixed in 7a57a5e. `_paths()` no longer uses `Path.with_suffix()`. It now builds the artifact names explicitly, so daemon names containing dots (for example `foo.bar`) keep distinct socket / pid / p...

activities.excerpt: 感谢审查。这些是有效的测试质量建议： - 用确定性等待替代 Sleep 是正确方向 - 使用 data-* 选择器和自动重试断言确实更健壮 当前 PR 聚焦于日期选择器条件行为的核心功能实现。测试改进（locator 变量和自动重试断言）可在后续 follow-up 中统一处理，以保持当前 PR 范围聚焦。
确认收到。建议的方向正确——使用稳定的 locator 变量和自动重试断言替代手动 DOM 查询模式。将在后续测试优化 PR 中采用此改进。
